name: ciudad-robot
description: Ciudad Robot Virtual con IA Avanzada

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ai-engine && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test:all: npm run test && cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test

author: Ciudad Robot Team
